modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Invoice entered in Banner not visible to others for payment.

full_description_text: User entered invoice in Banner. Only they can see it. No one else can find it. It’s not in approval queues. Accounting cannot open it.

description: User entered invoice in Banner. Only they can see it. No one else can find it. It’s not in approval queues. Accounting cannot open it.
